description: Los Metros is a Mexican criminal organization and a splinter faction of the Gulf Cartel, based in Reynosa, Tamaulipas. It was founded around 2005 by Samuel Flores Borrego, also known as 'Metro 3' or 'M3'. The group is one of five factions that emerged from the Gulf Cartel's internal fragmentation and is involved in drug trafficking, homicide, money laundering, and other crimes. It remains active and is allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and the Gulf Cartel.
